untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options strategy (bull call spread: buy call at lower strike, sell call at higher strike) which is a derivatives structure requiring strike price and premium data. The allowed indicators are equity price/technical indicators only. Strike prices, implied volatility, time decay, and option Greeks are not available in the indicator set. The signal cannot be translated to equity price action rules without losing the core strategy logic.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_77 is an options strategy requiring strike selection and option-specific parameters (Greeks, IV, extrinsic value). Added a generic uptrend entry condition (close > sma_20) and reversal exit (close < sma_20) as placeholder, but this does not capture the actual bull call spread mechanics. A proper backtest would require an options pricing engine with strike data.
